candidate_definition_hints.text: A set of spiders and scrapers to extract location information from places that post their location on the internet.

A project to generate [point of interest (POI)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Point_of_interest) data sourced [from websites](docs/WHY_SPIDER.md) with 'store location' pages. The project uses [`scrapy`](https://scrapy.org/), a popular Python-based web scraping framework, to exec…
